questions.question: What nation has its capital in Zagreb?
What wheelchair-ridden comedian, bald from chemotherapy, had a fan come up to him and say: 'You maniac, what a schtick'?
What U.S. leader mistakenly predicted: 'Old Ho can't turn me down'?
What was mechanic Ernest Holmes the first to make, by bolting a tripod onto his 1913 Cadillac?
What was the winningest NCAA Division 1 basketball team in the 1980s?
What billionaire, after trying all 31 Baskin Robbins flavors, decided he wanted two scoops of 'banana nut' with every meal?
